description: A client that reads only the first page of a paginated endpoint and presents it as the complete result set.
body: Failure mode: the SDK calls a list endpoint once and returns the first page, ignoring the next-page cursor, so callers silently get a truncated collection. Detection signals: result counts cap at the page size; missing items that exist on the server; no cursor-following loop in the client. Do not treat a single page as the full collection. Safer fallback: provide an auto-paginating iterator that follows cursors to exhaustion, document ordering and page size, and verify against a multi-page fixture that the count matches the server total.
